text_excerpt: News | Dr Luke Evans MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Dr Luke Body Image Campaign News Responses Contact My monthly columns News Representing Hinckley and Bosworth in 2025! Monday, 22 December, 2025 I'm immensely proud to represent our community, here are just some of the times I've mentioned our area in Parliament this year. 2025's been busy - roll on 2026! Most importantly, Merry Christmas and Happy New Year to you and your loved ones. Speeches in Parliament Where will you be watching the World Cup? 1st May 2026 When the World Cup starts next month, many people across our community will plan to be out and about watching the games and supporting their side. With it being... Local News Why I would refer the Prime Minister to the Privileges Committee over Mandelson scandal 29th April 2026 Last night I spoke in the debate setting out why I would refer the Prime Minister to the Privileges Committee. The vote was: In favour of referral: 223 Against... Speeches in Parliament My speech in debate on Wheelchair Provision 24th April 2026 On Tuesday, as Shadow Health Minister, I responded to a debate on Wheelchair Provision. We spoke about how wheelchair users, and disability equipment users more... In yesterday's emergency debate on Peter Mandelson scandal, I referenced a scene from 'A Few Good Men' which...
